phase_critical_quality_notes.terms-mechanisms: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 4 terms/mechanisms — every substantive row cites **chunk_id** per contract. No promoted concepts[] yet.
phase_critical_quality_notes.shaped-story-map: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 5 **shaped_story_map.json** — shaped story map, **evidence_chunk_ids[]**; rule **shaped-story-shape** (+ **scanners.json** binding). Read **shaped-story-map.md**.
phase_critical_quality_notes.domain-types: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 6 sparse types — promotion bar, **owns**, evidence; story map precedes types (rule **story-map-before-domain-types**).
phase_critical_quality_notes.variant-classification: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 7 variant representation — explicit per-family decisions **before** deep property work (rule **variant-decisions-before-deepen**).
phase_critical_quality_notes.deepen: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 8 deepen — responsibilities, depends_on, no anemic/god concepts; approved tooling only (rule **deepen-approved-tools-only**).
phase_critical_quality_notes.integrate: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 9 integrate — one coherent map/model/spec; drain candidate queue; cross-cutting resolved or deferred in writing.
phase_critical_quality_notes.validate-render: **Focus (this phase):** Phase 10 gates — **build.py** pipeline, **evidence-citations-required** scanner, manifest, reproducible reports. Render traces to validated artifacts.
